channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: What to know about Israeli President Herzog’s trip to Central America?
item.description: Israeli Foreign Ministry says that four-day visit to Panama and Costa Rica will deepen ties with partners in the region.

item.title: US president Trump restarts Pope feud ahead of Rubio visit to Vatican
item.description: Donald Trump has reignited his public attacks on Pope Leo, claiming he supports Iran obtaining nuclear weapons.

item.title: Iran’s Araghchi holds talks with China’s Wang Yi in Beijing
item.description: Iran's foreign minister meets his Chinese counterpart one week before President Donald Trump's visit to Beijing.

item.title: Romania’s pro-EU government ousted after no-confidence vote
item.description: The pro-European Union coalition of Romanian Prime Minister Ilie Bolojan has collapsed after a vote of no confidence.

item.title: US pauses plan to guide ships through the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Donald Trump has said that the US military operation guiding ships through the Strait of Hormuz will be paused.

item.title: Spain agrees to let hantavirus-hit cruise ship dock in Canary Islands
item.description: Three people have died since the outbreak in April, while two crew members on board the ship require urgent care.

item.title: Protesters rally in Louisiana and Tennessee against redistricting
item.description: Demonstrators rallied in Louisiana and Tennessee against against redistricting.

item.title: Iran war live: Trump says Hormuz operation paused amid US, Tehran talks
item.description: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth says ceasefire with Iran remains in place despite growing tensions in Hormuz Strait.

item.title: Thai temples launch rockets in friendly festival rivalry
item.description: Temples in Thailand gathered for the annual ‘Look Noo’ rocket festival, an ancient Mon tradition.

item.title: Buses block off roads in Bolivia as transport workers strike over fuel
item.description: Public workers blocked the streets of El Alto, Bolivia with buses, cars, and trucks during a transportation strike.

item.title: Trump pauses US operation in Strait of Hormuz in push for deal with Iran
item.description: US president says 'Project Freedom' suspended to see whether an agreement with Iran can be finalised and signed.

item.title: CENTCOM: ‘Safe path’ through Hormuz is US priority in ‘Project Freedom’
item.description: US CENTCOM spokesman Tim Hawkins says the main priorities in Hormuz are securing safe routes & blockading Iran.

item.title: Arsenal beat Atletico to reach first Champions League final in 20 years
item.description: Bukayo Saka seals a 1-0 win for Arsenal as they take their Champions League semifinal 2-1 on aggregate against Atletico.

item.title: Before Vatican trip, Rubio defends Trump remarks on Pope Leo over Iran
item.description: Comments come before Marco Rubio’s meeting with Pope Leo XIV at the Vatican on Thursday.

item.title: Israel kills one boy, injures officers in strike on Gaza police station
item.description: A 15-year-old boy, Mahmoud Sahweil, was killed when Israel struck a Gaza police station.

item.title: US Army says ‘Project Freedom’ in blockaded Hormuz has ‘just begun’
item.description: A US Central Command spokesperson says the mission to secure a safe passage of ships in the blocked waterway has begun.

item.title: Could OPEC break lead to era of energy volatility?
item.description: How unstable is the global oil market?

item.title: Mauritania’s plan to close private schools sparks backlash
item.description: Mauritania’s plan to shut most private primary schools and move students into free public schools is sparking backlash.

item.title: US plans to hike tariffs on EU cars to 25% will hit luxury market the most
item.description: US says it will hike tariffs to 25% because the EU has not complied with trade deal last year that set tariffs at 15%.

item.title: Miscalculation over Strait of Hormuz could ‘bring an all-out war’
item.description: Neither the US nor Iran are willing to compromise on the Strait of Hormuz, increasing the chance of miscalculation.

item.title: Sudan recalls Ethiopia ambassador after strikes on Khartoum
item.description: Sudan has recalled its ambassador to Addis Ababa, accusing Ethiopia of being behind attacks on Khartoum’s airport.

item.title: Video: Trump says Iran should ‘wave the white flag’
item.description: US President Donald Trump said Iran should ‘wave the white flag of surrender’ in the war.

item.title: US push for Lebanon and Israel leaders to meet could inflame tensions
item.description: Lebanon's President Joseph Aoun is under pressure to meet with Israel's Benjamin Netanyahu on a US visit this month.

item.title: UK convicts four Palestine Action activists over break-in at Israeli firm
item.description: Members of the now-banned Palestine Action group raided Elbit's facility in Bristol months into Israel's war on Gaza.

item.title: Microsoft, Google, xAI give US access to AI models for security testing
item.description: The deal comes days after the Pentagon announces an agreement with seven tech giants to use AI in classified systems
